name: Lancetfish (SS-296)
events: The page dealing with the wartime history of USS Lancetfish was created in July 2023.
12 Feb 1945 USS Lancetfish (T/Cdr. E.B. Orr, USN) is commissioned at the Boston Navy Yard where she had arrived on 19 May 1944 for further outfitting.
15 Mar 1945 USS Lancetfish (T/Cdr. E.B. Orr, USN), which was still at the Boston Navy Yard, sank by accident while alongside a pier.
A shipyard worker opened No.10 torpedo tube not knowing that the outer door was already open opened and seawater started flooding the submarine which sank in about 42 feet of water.
23 Mar 1945 At the Boston Navy Yard, USS Lancetfish (T/Cdr. E.B. Orr, USN) is raised.
24 Mar 1945 USS Lancetfish (T/Cdr. E.B. Orr, USN) is decommissioned at the Boston Navy Yard. She was paid off into reserve as repair costs were deemed to be too high.
